title: Blood Razors

{{Quote|The Blood Razors may have a tough name, but their chief purpose is to provide for the industrial sector's outcast inhabitants. They traffic black market goods and re-distribute materials stolen from Imperial forces.|[[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]], ''[[Smuggler's Handbook/Legends|Smuggler's Handbook]]''|<ref name="PSG" />}}
The '''Blood Razors''' were a [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] from [[Biivren]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Their activities also included smuggling and piracy, in particular in the [[Karthakk system]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Ahh, the smugglers. They have been a thorn in our side for awhile. Their ground operatives have stolen too many of our missions and goals. For some reason, their ship has been shot down by forces unknown. Looks as if they have more enemies than we thought.|[[Andria E'liyha]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:AE" />}}
The Blood Razors were a swoop gang from Biivren,<ref name="CDAG" /> a minor industrial world in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="PSG" /> They were formed to assist outcast inhabitants of the planet when the big corporations took over. Their primary activity was to traffic [[Black market/Legends|black market]] goods in the guise of [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] races.<ref name="CDAG" />

The Blood Razors were also present in the [[Karthakk system]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], were they acted as [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. They controlled the area of space known as the [[Crimson Talon]] where they had a small [[Blood Razors outpost|outpost]].<ref name="SCKS" /> In space battles, Blood Razors pilots flew [[Kihraxz assault fighter]]s, [[Ixiyen-class fast attack craft|''Ixiyen''-class fast attack crafts]] and [[Rihkxyrk assault fighter]]s.<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref> The Blood Razors were rumored to have access to radar technology that can detect certain unique codes used by ships that approach within their range.<ref name="SWG:AT">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Adar Tallon"}}</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|Some of Nym's munitions were stolen by some Blood Razor pirates. First get back those munitions and eliminate the Blood Razor leader, Jorund Saleem. That will be a good start.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:MPwN">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=faction|Rebel|Making Peace with Nym|Lok}}</ref>}}
The Blood Razors were formed on Biivren during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. Their objective was to bring some justice to the inhabitants of the [[Biivren's industrial sector|industrial sector]] of the world that was controlled by corrupted [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] and corporate authorities. The gang was led by a swooper named [[Shirro]] and [[Vahcer]] served as his second in command. The Blood Razors used to raid and plunder Imperial and corporate installations, redistributing the stolen goods to poor citizens.<ref name="PSG" />

[[File:BloodRazorsTransport.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The downed Blood Razor's transport on Lok.]]
The Blood Razors used to visit the Karthakk system long before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="SCKS" /> At one point, one of their [[Downed Blood Razor's Transport|transport ships]] crash landed on the planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]],<ref name="SWG:DBRT" /> in the Karthakk system.<ref name="SCKS" /> The criminals soon established operations on Lok and turned their crashed ship into their planetary headquarters.<ref name="SWG:DBRT" /> The Blood Razors on Lok were led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jorund Saleem]].<ref name="SWG:MPwN" />

The Blood Razors were also in conflict with the [[Kimogila Fanatics]]. After the Battle of Yavin, the once-peaceful Karthakk system became riddled with war, preventing civilians and freighters easy passage. The Kimogila pirates conquered the [[Umber Scale]] region from the Blood Razors, pushing them back to the other side of the [[Spine of Lok]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]]. Hence, the Blood Razors only ventured out from the Crimson Talon territory to attack the Kimogila Fanatics and sabotage their expansion.<ref name="SCKS" />

The Blood Razors on Lok were enemies of the [[Canyon Corsairs]] and [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenants]].<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the Blood Razors stole munitions from the Lok Revenants. In an attempt to convince Nym to help the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] tasked Rebel operatives with finding and killing [[Mahar Spince]] who had betrayed Nym by helping the Blood Razors. The Rebel agents also attacked a [[Blood Razor base]] and killed the Blood Razor leader Jorund Saleem.<ref name="SWG:MPwN" />
